UI_DayBless_Fail_1: Dayvinho gazes at you... and looks away. Not today.
UI_DayBless_Fail_2: The gnome remains silent. The blessing does not come.
UI_DayBless_Fail_3: Dayvinho shrugs. Maybe next time, survivor.
UI_DayBless_Fail_4: The little gnome hums softly... nothing happens.
UI_DayBless_XpBoost_1: Dayvinho's eyes glow! Your skills sharpen for a while.
UI_DayBless_XpBoost_2: The gnome whispers ancient knowledge into your mind!
UI_DayBless_XpBoost_3: Dayvinho blesses your hands — you learn faster now.
UI_DayBless_XpBoost_4: A warm light flows through you. Experience pours in!
UI_DayBless_Luck_1: Dayvinho winks. Fortune smiles upon you!
UI_DayBless_Luck_2: The gnome tosses a lucky coin your way.
UI_DayBless_Luck_3: Dayvinho hums a lucky tune — the world bends for you.
UI_DayBless_Luck_4: You feel inexplicably lucky. Thank Dayvinho.
UI_DayBless_Foraging_1: Dayvinho points toward the wilderness. Rare things await!
UI_DayBless_Foraging_2: The gnome sniffs the air — he knows where the good stuff is.
UI_DayBless_Foraging_3: Dayvinho whispers: 'Look closer. The forest provides.'
UI_DayBless_Foraging_4: Your eyes sharpen. Hidden treasures reveal themselves.
UI_DayBless_Gift_1: Dayvinho reaches into nowhere and hands you something!
UI_DayBless_Gift_2: The gnome grins and drops a gift at your feet.
UI_DayBless_Gift_3: Dayvinho says: 'From the earth, for you.' A gift appears!
UI_DayBless_Gift_4: A small treasure materializes — Dayvinho's generosity!
UI_DayBless_FullBelly_1: Dayvinho pats your stomach. Hunger fades away.
UI_DayBless_FullBelly_2: The gnome cooks something invisible. You feel full!
UI_DayBless_FullBelly_3: Dayvinho whispers: 'Eat well, fight well.' Hunger retreats.
UI_DayBless_FullBelly_4: A warm feeling fills your belly. Dayvinho provides.
UI_DayBless_FreshWater_1: Dayvinho splashes you with blessed water. Thirst gone!
UI_DayBless_FreshWater_2: The gnome conjures a cool drink from thin air.
UI_DayBless_FreshWater_3: Dayvinho says: 'Hydration is survival.' You feel refreshed.
UI_DayBless_FreshWater_4: Pure water courses through you — Dayvinho's gift.
UI_DayBless_Rest_1: Dayvinho hums a lullaby. Fatigue melts away.
UI_DayBless_Rest_2: The gnome places a tiny hand on your shoulder — energy returns.
UI_DayBless_Rest_3: Dayvinho whispers: 'Rest, warrior.' Your body obeys.
UI_DayBless_Rest_4: Refreshing warmth washes over you. Dayvinho restores you.
UI_DayBless_Spirit_1: Dayvinho raises his tiny fist. Stress and boredom fade!
UI_DayBless_Spirit_2: The gnome sings an uplifting tune — your spirit lifts.
UI_DayBless_Spirit_3: Dayvinho says: 'Strong mind, strong survivor.' You feel it.
UI_DayBless_Spirit_4: A calm clarity settles over your mind. Dayvinho's work.
UI_DayBless_GoodMood_1: Dayvinho does a little dance. Happiness blooms!
UI_DayBless_GoodMood_2: The gnome tells a terrible joke. Somehow it helps.
UI_DayBless_GoodMood_3: Dayvinho winks: 'Smile. You are still alive.' You do.
UI_DayBless_GoodMood_4: Unhappiness drains away. Dayvinho made it so.
UI_DayBless_InnerPeace_1: Dayvinho closes his eyes. The stress dissolves.
UI_DayBless_InnerPeace_2: The gnome breathes slowly. You feel calm follow.
UI_DayBless_InnerPeace_3: Dayvinho whispers: 'Peace is power.' Stress fades.
UI_DayBless_InnerPeace_4: A stillness enters your chest. Dayvinho's blessing.
UI_DayBless_CalmSleep_1: Dayvinho arranges a nest. Your next sleep will be peaceful.
UI_DayBless_CalmSleep_2: The gnome hums a lullaby. Sweet dreams await you.
UI_DayBless_CalmSleep_3: Dayvinho says: 'Rest well tonight.' You will.
UI_DayBless_CalmSleep_4: The gnome tucks you in (spiritually). Restful sleep ahead.
UI_DayBless_SkilledHands_1: Dayvinho guides your hands. Everything moves faster!
UI_DayBless_SkilledHands_2: The gnome oils your joints (spiritually). Efficiency up!
UI_DayBless_SkilledHands_3: Dayvinho says: 'Work smart, live longer.' You feel it.
UI_DayBless_SkilledHands_4: Your craft speed rises. Dayvinho approves.
UI_DayBless_Fisherman_1: Dayvinho sits at the riverbank. The fish sense a master!
UI_DayBless_Fisherman_2: The gnome whispers to the water. Fish cannot resist.
UI_DayBless_Fisherman_3: Dayvinho says: 'They come to you now.' Fishing improved.
UI_DayBless_Fisherman_4: A lucky aura surrounds your hook. Dayvinho's gift.
UI_DayBless_Harvest_1: Dayvinho kneels to the soil. Plants will grow faster!
UI_DayBless_Harvest_2: The gnome sings to your garden. The earth responds.
UI_DayBless_Harvest_3: Dayvinho says: 'The land rewards the patient.' Harvest blessed.
UI_DayBless_Harvest_4: A green warmth spreads from Dayvinho. Growth accelerated.
UI_DayBless_Lumberjack_1: Dayvinho flexes (impressively for his size). Logs await!
UI_DayBless_Lumberjack_2: The gnome marks the best trees. More logs per swing!
UI_DayBless_Lumberjack_3: Dayvinho says: 'Every tree has more to give.' It does.
UI_DayBless_Lumberjack_4: Blessed axe work — Dayvinho ensures a bonus log.
UI_DayBless_LightSteps_1: Dayvinho tiptoes. You learn to move like a shadow.
UI_DayBless_LightSteps_2: The gnome shushes you, then teaches you silence.
UI_DayBless_LightSteps_3: Dayvinho says: 'Walk like mist.' Noise drops.
UI_DayBless_LightSteps_4: Your footsteps become whispers. Dayvinho approves.
UI_DayBless_SharpEyes_1: Dayvinho polishes his tiny glasses. You see further!
UI_DayBless_SharpEyes_2: The gnome points at nothing — you realize it was something.
UI_DayBless_SharpEyes_3: Dayvinho says: 'Look beyond the obvious.' Radius expands.
UI_DayBless_SharpEyes_4: Foraging range grows. Dayvinho lent you his vision.
UI_DayBless_Instinct_1: Dayvinho grabs your arm. 'Not there!' Your senses sharpen.
UI_DayBless_Instinct_2: The gnome sniffs danger. You feel it too now.
UI_DayBless_Instinct_3: Dayvinho says: 'Trust your gut.' Panic fades.
UI_DayBless_Instinct_4: Survival instinct kicks in. Dayvinho's doing.
UI_DayBless_Backpack_1: Dayvinho reorganizes your bag. More fits somehow!
UI_DayBless_Backpack_2: The gnome folds everything perfectly. Lighter load!
UI_DayBless_Backpack_3: Dayvinho says: 'Pack smart, not heavy.' You do.
UI_DayBless_NatHeal_1: Dayvinho presses herbs (invisible) to your wounds.
UI_DayBless_NatHeal_2: The gnome channels nature's warmth. You heal faster.
UI_DayBless_NatHeal_3: Dayvinho says: 'The body knows how.' Recovery speeds up.
UI_DayBless_NatHeal_4: Natural healing flows through you. Dayvinho's gift.
UI_DayBless_Resistant_1: Dayvinho slaps your back (hard for his size). Endurance!
UI_DayBless_Resistant_2: The gnome toughens your spirit. Your body follows.
UI_DayBless_Resistant_3: Dayvinho says: 'You are stronger than you think.' You are.
UI_DayBless_Resistant_4: Endurance flows back. Dayvinho restored you.
UI_DayBless_Courage_1: Dayvinho raises a tiny sword. Fear retreats before you!
UI_DayBless_Courage_2: The gnome stands between you and the dark. Panic fades.
UI_DayBless_Courage_3: Dayvinho says: 'Fear nothing.' And for a while, you don't.
UI_DayBless_Courage_4: Courage blooms in your chest. Dayvinho wills it so.
UI_DayBless_Sun_1: Dayvinho points at the sky. The clouds scatter!
UI_DayBless_Sun_2: The gnome waves his hand. The rain stops. Somehow.
UI_DayBless_Sun_3: Dayvinho says: 'Enough rain.' The sun agrees.
UI_DayBless_Sun_4: The clouds part for Dayvinho. Golden light appears.
UI_DayBless_Rainbow_1: Dayvinho spins in place. A rainbow shimmers overhead.
UI_DayBless_Rainbow_2: The gnome points at the sky with both hands. A rainbow!
UI_DayBless_Rainbow_3: Dayvinho says: 'Beauty survives too.' A rainbow appears.
UI_DayBless_Rainbow_4: Colors bloom across the sky. Dayvinho's happy today.
UI_DayBless_End_2: The warmth of Dayvinho retreats. Time to earn another.
UI_DayBless_End_3: The gnome rests. The blessing is over.
UI_DayCurse_Burn_1: Dayvinho SCREAMS as the flames touch him! A curse upon you!
UI_DayCurse_Burn_2: The gnome writhes! 'You burn what I love!' Cursed!
UI_DayCurse_Burn_3: Dayvinho's eyes go RED. Fire is NOT the answer!
UI_DayCurse_Burn_4: The gnome shrieks! Smoke rises — and so does your misfortune!
UI_DayCurse_Destroy_1: Dayvinho gasps! 'Why?!' A curse falls upon you.
UI_DayCurse_Destroy_2: The gnome shakes his fist! Destruction earns a price.
UI_DayCurse_Destroy_3: Dayvinho watches the rubble. His gaze darkens. Cursed.
UI_DayCurse_Destroy_4: The little gnome stamps his foot. The ground shakes (slightly).
UI_DayCurse_Trash_1: Dayvinho lunges for the trash. 'That could be useful!' Cursed!
UI_DayCurse_Trash_2: The gnome mourns what you discarded. A curse for your waste.
UI_DayCurse_Trash_3: Dayvinho sighs deeply. Waste has consequences.
UI_DayCurse_Trash_4: The gnome watches you trash it. His disappointment is palpable. Cursed!
UI_DayCurse_Explode_1: Dayvinho is LAUNCHED by the blast! A raging curse follows!
UI_DayCurse_Explode_2: The gnome lands somewhere. He is NOT happy. Cursed!
UI_DayCurse_Explode_3: Dayvinho tumbles through the air, furious. Your luck is GONE.
UI_DayCurse_Explode_4: The explosion launches Dayvinho. His curse is equally explosive.
UI_DayCurse_Run_1: Dayvinho watches in horror. 'They were just walking!' Cursed!
UI_DayCurse_Run_2: The gnome covers his eyes. A dark curse for dark deeds.
UI_DayCurse_Run_3: Dayvinho shakes his head slowly. The curse is already active.
UI_DayCurse_Run_4: The gnome witnesses your driving. He is not impressed. Cursed.
UI_DayCurse_Removed_1: Dayvinho notices he was left behind. His eyes darken. Cursed!
UI_DayCurse_Removed_2: The gnome yells from inside the container. 'I am not luggage!' Curse activated.
UI_DayCurse_Removed_3: Dayvinho was separated from you. He does not forgive abandonment.
UI_DayCurse_Removed_4: The pocket is empty. Dayvinho notices. The curse does not wait.
UI_DayCurse_End_2: The gnome crosses his arms. The curse is spent.
UI_DayCurse_End_3: Dayvinho exhales slowly. The darkness fades.
UI_DayBless_Found_1: Something small and determined settles into your pocket. Dayvinho grins.
UI_DayBless_Found_2: Dayvinho winks at you. Blessings are incoming, survivor.
UI_DayBless_Found_3: The little gnome makes himself at home. Strange luck follows this one.
UI_DayBless_Found_4: You found Dayvinho de Bolso! He seems pleased. For now.
